byLynnanne Nguyen, KOMO News Reporter

EDMONDS, Wash. —Police are investigating the armed robbery of a postal worker in Edmonds Tuesday night while the worker was working their evening route.

The Edmonds Police Department (EPD) said it happened just before 5:30 p.m. on the 7200 block of 179th St. SW. Surveillance video shows the USPS mail truck going down the street when a black car passes, then blocks the mail truck. The armed suspect then gets out and confronts the worker, forcing them at gunpoint to hand over keys for several Edmonds mail routes, including public and apartment mailboxes.

Police said Edmonds zip codes 98020 and 98026 may be affected.

"He was not injured in any way, there were no shots fired, it was a ‘Give me the keys,’ he complied and off he went," EPD Cmdr. Josh McClure said. "The reality is we want to get the person that’s running around putting a gun in people’s faces."

"Just based on the victim’s description, it appears he was watching him, waiting for the opportunity to make his move," McClure added.

Several residences in the area where the incident happened have locked mailboxes because of issues with mail theft in the past, according to neighbors.

"Our mailbox was open, and we believe it was stolen out of there, and the police found a car that had stolen mail in it," Pam Yi, who lives in the area, said of one instance.

"There’s been mail theft around here for awhile.," Krista Galloway, who also lives in the area, said. "You often see mail here on the ground, that’s why we got a lock box."

The suspect is described by police as a Black man in his 20s, about 5-foot-10, 150 pounds with approximately 5-inch long, tight dreadlocks, according to the EPD. Police said the suspect was wearing a blue disposable surgical mask and a black puffy jacket and fled in a black Nissan-style sedan going south on 72nd Ave W and west on Olympic View Drive.

Police ask anyone with information or surveillance video that may be of assistance to call 911.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Man robs USPS worker in Edmonds at gunpoint of mailbox keys
description: Police are investigating the armed robbery of a postal worker in Edmonds Tuesday night while the worker was working their evening route.
